case_title: JAY, MELVIN vs. ABDULRAHMAN, ABDULKERN A et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JAY, MELVIN AS TO DEFENDANT ABDULRAHMAN, ABDULKERN A CROSSON GARALD YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-07-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-06-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-18-1993

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-07-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON SEP-07-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR OCT-07-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-09-1993, OFF CALENDAR SANCTIONS PERMANENTLY STAYED.

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-07-1993, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-07-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-10-1993 CONTINUED FROM OCT-07-1993 TO NOV-10-1993 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-10-1993, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON NOV-10-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PLUS $50.00 FROM 07-OCT-93. TOTAL OF $150.00 TO BE PAID BY 09-DEC-93. TO SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED PER CRC 525., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-09-1993 CONTINUED FROM NOV-10-1993 TO DEC-09-1993 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
